responsibilities: Develop high-quality, efficient, and testable application code.
Participate in the entire Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).
Lead technical design, development, troubleshooting, and documentation for multi-platform systems.
Build REST-based microservices and integrate with external/internal APIs.
Create flowcharts, architectural diagrams, and documentation for solution design.
Maintain existing applications, resolve technical issues, and reduce technical debt.
Perform code reviews and ensure adherence to engineering best practices.
Ensure performance, scalability, and reliability of applications.
Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in an Agile environment.
